text: I want to cancel my filter subscription. I've been getting charged $47.99 every 3 months and I haven't even been using the filters. They're piling up in my garage.
Thank you for reaching out. I'd be happy to help you with your subscription. Could you provide me with your order number or subscription ID so I can look into this for you?
I don't have my subscription ID handy. My name is James T. and the last charge was $47.99 on March 15th, order #NV-91205. Can you just cancel it?

I found your account. I see you have an active quarterly subscription. Before I process the cancellation, I'd like to mention that we offer flexible delivery schedules — we could switch you to every 6 months instead, or pause your subscription temporarily.

No, I don't want to pause or change the schedule. I want it CANCELLED. This is the third time I've tried to resolve this. First time I called and was on hold for 40 minutes before hanging up. Second time I emailed and got an automated response that didn't help at all.

I understand your frustration and I apologize for the difficulty you've experienced. I've cancelled your subscription effective immediately — you won't receive any further shipments or charges. Your subscription ID is SUB-7734.
Fine. I also want a refund for the last shipment I received on March 15th since I never opened it. If this doesn't get resolved today I'm disputing every charge with my credit card company.

I've submitted a refund request for $47.99 to your original payment method. Please allow 5-7 business days for it to appear on your statement. You don't need to return the unopened shipment. I'm also flagging the website cancellation error to our tech team so other customers don't run into the same issue. Is there anything else I can help with?
